why_choose.subtitle: Why Choose Us
why_choose.title: Our Story
why_choose.desc: Established in 1997, Nhat Nam was founded with the vision of becoming a trusted importer and distributor of premium food products from Europe and the United States.

items.title: Becoming a Distribution Partner
items.desc: With this vision in mind, in 2000, Nhat Nam founded Swiss Alps® – Thao Nguyen, a separate entity dedicated to producing Central European-style sausages.

items.title: Quality at the Core
items.desc: All products are made from natural ingredients, with imported German beechwood used for smoking to ensure authentic flavor and premium quality.

items.a: Nhat Nam Food Production Trading Service Co., Ltd. was established in Ho Chi Minh City in 1997.

items.q: What services does Nhat Nam provide?
items.a: Nhat Nam has developed into a well-known distributor and supplier of products such as frozen seafood, meat, groceries, herbs and spices, whipping cream, cake decorating cream, and baking ingredients.

items.q: Does Nhat Nam specialize in Central European sausages?
items.a: In 2000, Nhat Nam founded Swiss Alps® - Thao Nguyen as a separate entity to produce sausages for a wide range of customers, including foreigners and Vietnamese who want to enjoy Central European sausages.

items.q: What are the ingredients and sources of Nhat Nam products?
items.a: All our products are made from natural ingredients, without the use of artificial coloring, flavorings, fillers, or leavening agents. All smoked products are naturally smoked using birch wood imported from Germany.

testimonial.subtitle: Testimonials
testimonial.title: What Our Customers Say About Us

items.content: Authentic European quality: 'The sausages and cold cuts here have a very distinctive, authentic European flavor. Especially the German sausage lines—you can really taste the freshness, rich seasoning, and the strong aroma of natural herbs.'

Diversity and refinement: 'Nhat Nam Fine Foods always offers a wide variety of sausage products in both flavor and size. From sausages to processed meats, everything is neatly and hygienically packaged, making it perfect for creating cold cut platters for home parties.'

Long-standing reputation: 'I’ve known Nhat Nam since its early days (1997). It’s a trusted destination for those who appreciate Western cuisine in Ho Chi Minh City. The consistent quality over the years is what I value most about this brand.'

Dedicated service: 'The staff provide very enthusiastic advice on storage and cooking methods to achieve the best taste. Fast delivery and careful packaging ensure that chilled products remain fresh upon arrival.'

items.title: Students Create Dishes from U.S. Potatoes with a Master Chef
items.content: At the HUTECH Young Chefs 2025 event, students had exciting experiences creating innovative dishes using U.S. potatoes.

items.title: Chef Norbert Ehrbar – A Man from Another Era
items.content: In 1999, a couple of friends founded Nhat Nam Company, operating in food import and export. Norbert was invited to join as a consultant and head chef for the restaurant.

items.title: Exciting HUTECH Young Chefs 2024 Event
items.content: Judges included Chef Norbert Ehrbar – Executive Chef and Culinary Advisor at Nhat Nam Fine Foods, member of the World Master Chef Society, along with top chefs from Vietnam.
